title: GDEX Examples: geoscientific workflows using NCAR's Geoscience Data Exchange
description: A collection of Jupyter notebooks demonstrating geoscientific workflows that use data from NCAR's Geoscience Data Exchange (GDEX), with computations performed on NCAR's HPC resources (Casper / Derecho). Covers observational, reanalysis, simulation, and data-fusion examples. Rendered site: https://ncar.github.io/gdex-examples/
